title: Wings Over Africa
writer: Ákos Tolnay, Marjorie Deans, Reginald Long
actors: Joan Gardner, Ian Colin, James Harcourt
plot: Two prospectors in Africa, Tony Cooper and Dalton come across a skeleton that has nearly been picked clean by vultures. They find a letter on the body addressed to a clerk in London named Wilkins . Cooper goes to Wilkins in London...
